title: Pildash #6394
definition:
Pildash = "flame of fire"

 1) one of the 8 sons of Nahor, the brother of Abraham, by Milcah his
    wife or niece
nasbUsage:
Definition: Pildash = "flame of fire"

 1) one of the 8 sons of Nahor, the brother of Abraham, by Milcah his
    wife or niece

    NASB:  a relative of Abraham
